name: Spicy Herbed Peppercorn Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 4 boned and skinned chicken breast halves, flattened
3 tablespoons shallots or white part of green onion, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Process peppercorns, thyme, and bay leaf pieces in a blender or food processor until the bay leaf is no longer visible and peppercorns are coarsely cracked.
2. Sprinkle both sides of the chicken with salt and the pepper mixture, shallots, and garlic. Press lightly so seasonings cling. Cover with a clean sheet of waxed paper and let stand at room temperature for 2 hours.
3. Discard the garlic.
4. Melt butter in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned and cooked through. Remove to serving plate and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
5. Add wine to pan drippings and cook over high heat, stirring often, for 2 minutes or until liquid is reduced to 3 tablespoons.
6. Spoon over chicken breasts and garnish with parsley sprigs.
